synopsis: The dinosaur fantasy revolves around a 12-year-old named Yuta and Gobi — a moving fossil. The two embark on a journey with Yuta's friends to chase a fossil thief and find Gobi's stolen fossil mother. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Aterui
synopsis: A pseudo-historical movie that follows a modern day elementary schooler as he's tossed back into time to observe Aterui--a real leader of the Emishi who fought against the Imperial Yamato Court.

title: Throne of Ten Thousand Swords
synopsis: In the vast Jiang Dynasty, the culture of swordsmanship has been passed down for millennia, and the people take pride in practicing it. However, reaching its pinnacle, the "Sword God Realm," is a rare feat. Over a decade ago, the once-powerful Wuji Sword God was severely injured by the schemes of the Changsheng Sword God, forcing him to retreat into seclusion in the mountains, detached from worldly affairs. Now, Zhan Yibai, Wuji Sword God's only disciple, has finally come of age, and the time has arrived for him to embark on a journey of training as agreed upon by master and disciple. Before departing, to enhance Zhan Yibai's self-defense abilities, Wuji Sword God gifted him his personal sword and instructed him to rapidly achieve the realm of Sword God. New to the secular world, Zhan Yibai befriends Jiang Mingyue, Princess of the dynasty, and Li Kuang, the second son of the Prince of Zhennan. Hoping to rapidly grow, he and his companions participate in the "Ancient Dynasty Ruins" tria

title: GoWest: Overworked
synopsis: Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by the “Hun Dun”. Murong Qiong established the Demon Sect to resist it, but they couldn’t manage to win despite arduous battles. The Divine Messenger Yi Zhihua descended and taught everyone the cultivation method of demonization, and they finally managed to defeat the Hun Dun. However, after the Divine Messenger left, the cultivation method went out of control as it spread in the martial arts world. Disappointed, Murong Qiong retired and his subordinate Yu Huabing seized the power, improved the cultivation method, and created an era of Punk True Qi, making the martial arts world thrive. But the price of prosperity was that all the cultivators became “Shang Gong fanatics”. Dongfang Sheng, harboring an idealistic and sincere aspiration, found Murong Qiong secluded in the Westward Restaurant. He hoped that Murong Qiong would assist in restoring the glory of the martial arts world.The comical story thus began... (Source: Bilibili

title: Wu Kong Da Zhan Er Lang Shen
titleRomaji: Wu Kong Da Zhan Er Lang Shen
synonyms: Monkey King vs. Er Lang Shen
synopsis: Based on a few early chapters of classic fantasy novel Journey to the West, the story tells how the Monkey King rises against the heaven and has a horrific fight with Er Lang Shen, the nephew of Jade Emperor, who rules the Heaven. The film features puppet live action, about 30% of the movie, with animated 3D backgrounds and characters. It was nominated for the Asia Pacific Screen Award for Best Animated Feature Film at the 1st Asia Pacific Screen Awards.

tags.name: Puppetry

title: Kkomimanyeo Rara Season 1
synonyms: Komi witch lara
synopsis: The Porr School of Magic is home to aspiring witches. Our protagonist Lara quickly begins to make friends, despite the school's best student, Gina, resenting Lara for being from a non magical family. Lara's energetic, witty, and charming personality helps her empathize with and heal the minipets, resolve magical disturbances, and gradually grow into a mini-witch!

title: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
titleRomaji: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
synopsis: The young Qin Feng, hailed as a once-in-a-millennium prodigy in the Wuji Nation, was framed and his entire family was wiped out, leaving him alone. After his martial veins were crippled, he was cast into a small, remote sect to fend for himself. Determined to become stronger and seek revenge, he endured constant bullying, often protected by his kind-hearted Second Senior Sister, who shared a common fate. Unbeknownst to everyone, Qin Feng had already secretly embarked on the arduous path of physical cultivation. Upon learning that three members of his sect were eligible to train at the Tiandao Academy, and with the spots already secured, he broke free from his humiliation. Upon being humiliated once again by the sect's prodigy, Yun Tianyu, he revealed his physical cultivation identity and violently assaulted Yun Tianyu, shocking everyone. Afterwards, he took the initiative, repeatedly teaching Yun Tianyu a lesson, openly challenging the protective Great Elder, and vowing to get a spot i

title: Peerless Divine Emperor
synopsis: Jing Yunxiao was once the supreme Emperor of Samsara on the Dragon Territory Continent. When faced with a conspiracy, he used the Five-Turn Samsara Technique to be reborn as a young man from the Jing family of Hongye Town. Drawing on his past life memories, Jing Yunxiao helped the Jing family overcome the threat of Black Dragon Village, but his grandfather, Jing Yufeng, was also seriously injured. Desperate, Jing Yunxiao shouldered the responsibility of saving his family and journeyed alone to Huangshi City in search of medicine. Misfortunes never come singly. The Jing family, originally an aristocratic family in the capital of Baizhan Kingdom, retreated to Hongye Town to escape the pursuit of the God of War Palace. Jing Yunxiao's reappearance caught the attention of the God of War Palace. To eliminate the root of the problem, the God of War Palace dispatched the assassin organization, the Dark Feather Palace, to Huangshi City to assassinate Jing Yunxiao. Meanwhile, Jing Yunxiao, in pu

title: Where's the Dragon?
synopsis: The Zodiac Dragon is missing, and the World plunges into chaos. Jen, a righteous ten year-old girl, must join forces with the legendary Zodiac Animals to find Dragon, restore order to the world, and save humanity. When the Jade Emperor hears of Dragon’s five hundred year disappearance, impetuously he declares he is hosting a race, opened to creatures of all kinds, to replace the existing Zodiac. Harmony on Earth is severely threatened. But wait, behind the entire calamity is a demonic Roach King conspiring a coup d’état of the entire Zodiac. Cockroaches! Millions and millions of cockroaches, ready to rule the World! On the day Jen inadvertently finds a Dragon scale, she encounters three talking animals -- a Pig, a Sheep, and a Horse - three of the twelve Zodiacs. Apparently, the scale is the only clue to Dragon’s whereabouts. And to battle Roach King, Jen and the three have to find and unite the rest of the original Zodiac -- Rat, Cow, Tiger, Rabbit, Snake, Monkey, Rooster, and Dog. To

title: Lion Nanny’s Journey
synopsis: Lion Nanny rides the train and embarks on a life journey while interacting with those around her. (Source: Graduate Work 2018, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation)

title: Spots Spots
synopsis: A young man is drawing sketches of birds in the woods. The spotted pattern of the bird's wings begins to scatter. He gradually becomes mesmerized by the pattern… 1st Year Work 2011 by Yuanyuan Hu, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Tang Zhi Zhi Yi
synopsis: A chance encounter between young Tang Zhi and a dragon maiden unexpectedly awakened his "Heavenly Eye"—allowing him to see gods and spirits roaming the mortal realm. These unique eyes led him into a world that coexisted with the mundane. Through unforgettable experiences, Tang Zhi made friends with all sorts of people and experienced laughter and warmth in seemingly ordinary yet subtly wondrous daily moments. An ordinary scholar, encountering and accompanying a group of gods and spirits with diverse personalities amidst the everyday life of the mortal world—this story of adventure, friendship, and growth is slowly unfolding. (Source: Bangumi, translated)

title: Tian Long Ba Bu
synonyms: Demi-Gods and Semi-Devils
synopsis: The ephemerality of all beings, a thousand faces with all characteristics, complicated feelings, and humans that aren't humans. Prince Duan Yu, having run away from home many times, is finally about to welcome a huge turning point in his life. Seeing the most beautiful woman in front of him, he brazenly calls out 'Fairy Sister'! This is the familiar story of 'Demi-Gods and Semi-Devils' by author Jin Yong you know so well, as well as a new story! (Source: Tencent, translated)
